document.title: NI 43-101 Technical Report for the Deep Fox and Foxtrot project in Canada dated May, 2022.pdf
document.description: This is an NI 43-101 Technical Report detailing the Deep Fox and Foxtrot Rare Earth Element (REE) Project located near St. Lewis, Newfoundland and Labrador, Canada, providing a Preliminary Economic Assessment (PEA) and updated Mineral Resource estimates.
